结节病.summary: 通过跨组织转录组全关联分析，发现了结节病的多个新易感基因。

ILD.title: Changes in Interstitial Lung Disease Nomenclature.
ILD.authors: Wells AU, Rajan SK
ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: Atezolizumab + Chemotherapy in Older Patients With Lung Cancer in Japan.
ILD.authors: Shimizu J, Nishio M, Ohashi K, Osoegawa A, Kikuchi E, Kimura H, Goto Y, Miyauchi E, Yoshioka H, Yoshino I, Misumi T, Yoshimori K, Shibata K, Tsuda T, Seike M, Ota T, Samata K, Kobayashi Y, Tanaka M, Gemma A
ILD.summary: J-TAIL-2研究显示，在日本老年肺癌患者中，阿替利珠单抗联合化疗的疗效和安全性良好。

ILD.title: Clinical features, pathogenesis, and treatment of anti-MDA5 antibody-positive interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Yamaguchi K
ILD.summary: 抗MDA5抗体阳性皮肌炎相关间质性肺病进展快、预后差，三药联合疗法可改善结局。

ILD.title: Lung disease in rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Bendstrup E, Dieude P, Kreuter M, Hoffmann-Vold AM, Cottin V, Hauge EM
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎常见肺部表现如间质性肺病和气道疾病，吸烟是重要风险因素。

ILD.title: Analysis of interstitial lung disease in pharmacovigilance databases: Coding challenges and interpretation biases-An update.
ILD.authors: Freppel R, Benis A, Bonniaud P, Faillie JL, Grandvuillemin A
ILD.summary: 药物警戒数据库中ILD编码存在术语演变和偏好差异，导致信号检测偏差。

ILD.title: Pulmonary hypertension associated with interstitial lung disease: a state-of-the-art review.
ILD.authors: Raghu G, Sahay S, Price LC, Weatherald J, Rayner SG, Behr J, Boucly A, Das M, McLaughlin V, Rahaghi F, Rutland C, Ryu JH, Saggar R, Humbert M
ILD.summary: 肺动脉高压是间质性肺病常见并发症，预后差，诊断治疗面临多重挑战。

ILD.title: Impact of concomitant methotrexate on JAK inhibitors in rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease: a retrospective single-centre study from the KEIO-RA cohort.
ILD.authors: Suzuki K, Akiyama M, Shimanuki K, Kaneko Y
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病患者使用JAK抑制剂时，联用甲氨蝶呤不影响药物保留率及肺部疾病进展。

ILD.title: Interstitial lung involvement in rheumatoid arthritis patients treated with abatacept: a prospective observational study.
ILD.authors: Vacchi C, Sebastiani M, Carletto A, Bellis E, Cometi L, Venerito V, Curro ML, Carriero A, Foti R, Catanoso M, Favalli E, Bazzani C, Cozzini F, Morciano A, Iagnocco A, Guiducci S, Iannone F, Atzeni F, D'Angelo S, Pancaldi F, Burattini C, Fassio A, Cerri S, Salvarani C, Manfredi A
ILD.summary: 阿巴西普治疗类风湿关节炎患者中，间质性肺病多数稳定或改善，恶化率低。

ILD.title: Predictors of rapidly progressive interstitial lung disease in anti-MDA5 dermatomyositis: a meta-analysis.
ILD.authors: Liu T, Ji X, Wei Y, Zhong Y, Zhu J, Wang C, Li M
ILD.summary: 该Meta分析发现高龄、男性、发热、皮肤溃疡、关节炎及CRP、LDH等实验室指标升高是抗MDA5阳性皮肌炎合并快速进展性间质性肺病的预测因素。

ILD.title: Combined immunosuppressive therapy in systemic sclerosis-associated interstitial lung disease: Phenotypes matter.
ILD.authors: Marchetti M, Motta F, Tonutti A, Selmi C, De Santis M
ILD.summary: 系统性硬化症相关间质性肺病的联合免疫抑制治疗应根据炎症表型个体化调整方案。

ILD.title: The evolving comorbidity landscape of rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Brooks RT, England BR, Kronzer VL, Crowson CS
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎的合并症谱系近30年演变显示间质性肺病和焦虑抑郁负担加重，心血管疾病等有所下降。

ILD.title: Advancing Transbronchial Lung Cryobiopsy in Interstitial Lung Disease with Adjunctive Tools and Smaller Cryoprobes.
ILD.authors: Arancibia-Cacace R, Alam S, Siew M
ILD.summary: 经支气管冷冻肺活检中，使用辅助工具和小型冷冻探针可提高间质性肺病诊断效能与安全性。

ILD.title: Early risk response to vasodilators and outcomes in interstitial lung disease associated pulmonary hypertension.
ILD.authors: Teramachi R, Fukihara J, Ichihara S, Kataoka K, Takei R, Yamano Y, Watanabe F, Yokoyama T, Kimura T, Kondoh Y
ILD.summary: 血管扩张剂治疗后的风险分层变化可预测间质性肺病相关肺动脉高压患者的预后。

ILD.title: Transbronchial Lung Cryobiopsy and Awake Video-Assisted Thoracic Surgery in Interstitial Lung Disease: Complementary Roles in a Stepwise Diagnostic Approach.
ILD.authors: Masi U, Sanduzzi Zamparelli A, Sanduzzi Zamparelli S
ILD.summary: 经支气管冷冻活检和清醒VATS在间质性肺病诊断中互补，可逐步提升诊断准确率并降低风险。

ILD.title: A statistical model for lung function trajectory and mortality in patients with fibrotic interstitial lung disease.
ILD.journal: Am J Respir Crit Care Med
ILD.authors: Wendelberger B, Jensen TP, Quintana M, Stewart I, Molyneaux PL, Maher TM, Oldham JM, Johnson SR, Fahy WA, Khan F, Saini G, Abdulqawi R, Allen R, Baldi BG, Chaudhuri N, Corte TJ, Cottin V, Funke-Chambour M, Glaspole I, Holland AE, Johannson KA, Khor YH, Kreuter M, Kulkarni T, Molina-Molina M, Martinez FJ, Montesi SB, Nathan SD, Piccari L, Rajan S, Rivera-Ortega P, Ryerson CJ, Sakamoto K, Wain LV, Wells AU, Adams W, Kawano-Dourado L, Jenkins RG, Lewis RJ
ILD.summary: 该模型联合分析肺功能下降与死亡风险，比单独分析更准确地估计FVC年下降率。

ILD.title: Visibility of breathlessness in fibrotic interstitial lung disease: perceptions of international healthcare professionals.
ILD.authors: Kalluri M, Makholm N, Prior TS, Bendstrup E, Adamali H, Barratt S, Lovell N, Russell AM, Pooler C
ILD.summary: 国际医疗专业人士认为，纤维化间质性肺病中的呼吸困难常被忽视和低估。

ILD.title: ERS Congress 2025: highlights from the Interstitial Lung Diseases Assembly.
ILD.authors: Khoury J, Yuksel A, Bizymi N, Fabozzi A, Garcia-Moyano M, Wijsenbeek M, Kreuter M, Fabbri L
ILD.summary: ERS 2025大会ILD研究进展：聚焦新型诊断工具、抗纤维化疗法及个体化管理策略。

ILD.title: Clinical and serological predictors of autoimmune etiology in patients with interstitial lung disease: a 10-year retrospective study.
ILD.authors: Kamburoglu A, Coskun BN, Dalkilic E, Pehlivan Y
ILD.summary: 自身免疫性间质性肺病（AI-ILD）占ILD患者一半，其中干燥综合征最常见。

ILD.title: Clinical and pulmonary function-based identification of HRCT-confirmed rheumatoid arthritis-associated interstitial lung disease.
ILD.authors: Chen X, Liu S, Zhang X, Yang X, Guo R, Zhang C
ILD.summary: 基于临床和肺功能指标可有效识别HRCT证实的类风湿关节炎相关间质性肺病。

ILD.title: Clinical and Imaging Features of Tepotinib-Induced Interstitial Lung Disease in the Post-Marketing Setting in Japan.
ILD.authors: Kato T, Baba T, Endo M, Endo S, Horii E, Kusumoto M
ILD.summary: 日本上市后监测显示替波替尼相关间质性肺炎发生率2.9%，其中死亡占0.9%，重症者多呈弥漫性肺泡损伤影像。
